sentence_reviews.text: A perceptron computes a weighted score and applies a threshold or activation, forming a minimal trainable neural classifier and historical basis for multilayer networks.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning, historical and feedforward network background; AIMA neural network / perceptron learning topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Weighted-score threshold classifier and historical role are supported by standard perceptron/neural-network references.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers is to connect Affine transforms & dense layers, Nonlinear activations to downstream capabilities including Tabular predictive analytics & decision support.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning feedforward/linear classifier and activation material; AIMA neural-network learning topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Affine and activation dependencies are supported; tabular decision-support downstream role is not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Tabular predictive analytics & decision support
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and AIMA supervised classifier/neural-network topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Single-layer classifiers can be used for feature-vector prediction, but the exact downstream decision-support claim is broad.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Affine transforms & dense layers
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning feedforward network layers as affine transformations followed by nonlinearities.
sentence_reviews.notes: A perceptron directly uses an affine weighted score.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Affine transforms & dense layers, Nonlinear activations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning/AIMA perceptron and neural-network limitations/model-selection context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported; generic limitation wording is not directly evidenced.

sentence_reviews.text: Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning feedforward neural network affine layers; AIMA perceptron/neural network topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: The weighted affine score is central.

sentence_reviews.text: Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Nonlinear activations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning activation functions in neural networks; AIMA threshold/perceptron units.
sentence_reviews.notes: Threshold/activation functions are central to perceptrons.

sentence_reviews.text: Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers follows the learning setup expressed by Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA perceptron learning topics; Deep Learning historical neural-network background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Perceptron learning is supported, but Hebbian/Oja/STDP are broader local-plasticity mechanisms not directly required for perceptrons.

sentence_reviews.text: Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA learning from examples / perceptron learning; Deep Learning supervised classifier context.

edge_reviews.notes: Perceptrons compute weighted affine scores; composes/core is supported.
Threshold/nonlinear activation is defining; composes/core is supported.
Perceptron learning is supported, but the broader local-plasticity node includes mechanisms not required here; common strength is only partly supported.
Perceptrons are supervised classifiers; trained_under/common is supported.
